context_text: <A> the vietnam thing and so i remember the selective service i remember / <B> sure / <A> you know boys being drafted and i i think that gives you a little bit of a different view on it / <B> uh-huh / <A> because you know they're being taken from their families and they're being put into war / <B> ooh / <A> so you know i see the military as you know think about it because you could get killed / <B> mhm
